summary: Iteration 147: Decision-Driven PMS Features fully verified. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed: Dashboard Command Center with summary stats and 'Dikkat Gerektiren' alerts section, Front Desk enhanced arrival cards with 'Giris Yap' and 'Folyo' buttons, Rooms tab with live cleaning indicators ('Temizlik bekliyor ~15 dk'), check-in flow working correctly. Turkish language UI confirmed.

issues: i18n translation keys showing briefly before translations load (e.g., 'common.welcome', 'auth.signIn') - minor UX issue

critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/pms/operational-alerts correctly returns alerts array, summary stats (arrivals_today, departures_today, inhouse, dirty_rooms), and available_clean_rooms
Backend /api/pms/room-alternatives/{room_number} correctly returns same_type and other_type alternatives
Frontend CommandCenter.jsx correctly implements data-testid attributes: command-center, cc-arrivals, cc-departures, cc-inhouse, cc-dirty, cc-alerts
Frontend FrontdeskTab.jsx correctly implements enhanced arrival cards with data-testid: arrival-card-{id}, checkin-{id}, folio-{id}
Frontend RoomsTab.jsx correctly implements cleaning indicators with data-testid: room-cleaning-{room_number}
Frontend PaymentDialog.jsx correctly implements intelligence bar with data-testid: payment-intelligence, payment-fill-balance
All Turkish language labels working correctly: 'Bugun Gelis', 'Bugun Cikis', 'Iceride', 'Kirli Oda', 'Dikkat Gerektiren', 'Giris Yap', 'Folyo', 'Temizlik bekliyor'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 147 verified decision-driven PMS features. Key endpoints: GET /api/pms/operational-alerts (returns alerts, summary, available_clean_rooms), GET /api/pms/room-alternatives/{room_number} (returns same_type, other_type alternatives). Dashboard shows CommandCenter with 4 summary stat cards and 'Dikkat Gerektiren' alerts section. PMS Front Desk shows enhanced arrival cards with 'Giris Yap' (check-in) and 'Folyo' buttons. Rooms tab shows 13 dirty rooms with cleaning indicators. Check-in flow working - tested successfully with Oda 101.

POST /api/auth/login.notes: Login with demo@hotel.com / demo123 returns access_token and user object

GET /api/pms/operational-alerts.returns: {alerts: [], summary: {arrivals_today, departures_today, inhouse, dirty_rooms, pending_payments_count, vip_arrivals, total_outstanding}, available_clean_rooms: []}

GET /api/pms/rooms.returns: Array of room objects with room_number, status, room_type

frontend_elements.cc-inhouse: PASS - Shows '4 Iceride' (increased to 5 after check-in)
frontend_elements.cc-alerts: PASS - Shows 'Dikkat Gerektiren (1)' with pending payments alert
frontend_elements.arrival-card-{id}: PASS - 8 arrival cards found with enhanced layout
frontend_elements.checkin-{id}: PASS - 8 check-in buttons found, check-in flow working
frontend_elements.folio-{id}: PASS - 8 Folyo buttons found, opens Guest Folio dialog
frontend_elements.room-cleaning-{room_number}: PASS - 13 cleaning indicators showing 'Temizlik bekliyor ~15 dk'
frontend_elements.quick-res-btn-{room_number}: PASS - 79 quick reservation buttons for empty rooms

user_flows.login: PASS - Login with demo credentials redirects to /app/dashboard
user_flows.check_in: PASS - Check-in completed successfully with toast notification
user_flows.folio_view: PASS - Folyo button opens Guest Folio dialog with Charges/Payments sections

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints return real data from MongoDB
